appliedUpdates.description: Added .factory/library/js-date-parsing-tz.md documenting the JavaScript Date parsing timezone gotcha (new Date without Z suffix parses as local time, manually adding offset double-applies it). This was the root cause of blocking bugs in localToUTC() and dayBoundsUTC() across 4 files.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'Supabase client: always use getSupabaseClient() from web/lib/supabase.ts — never import createClient directly in component files or create local client instances.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Prior to the fix-web-supabase-client-consolidation feature, 4 files each had independent getSupabaseClient() implementations with inconsistent caching. Now consolidated but the convention needs documenting to prevent recurrence.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: 'Shared browser-side utilities (getUserTimezone, Supabase client, timezone conversion) must be defined in web/lib/ and imported — never duplicated across component files.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: getUserTimezone() was duplicated in 4+ files before fix-web-timezone-bugs consolidated it to web/lib/timezone.ts. The same duplication pattern occurred with getSupabaseClient(). Both required dedicated fix features.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Create .factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md skill for web dashboard workers. All web-dashboard features (8 features total, including 2 fixes) reference skillName 'frontend-worker' but the skill doesn't exist. Workers fall back to mission-worker-base only.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fix feature reviews (fix-web-timezone-bugs, fix-web-supabase-client-consolidation) and all 6 original feature reviews confirmed the frontend-worker skill is missing. Each worker's skillFeedback noted the skill was not found.

rejectedObservations.observation: Extra blank line in dashboard-client.tsx after removing getUserTimezone()
rejectedObservations.reason: Cosmetic-only, no functional impact, not worth documenting or fixing

rejectedObservations.observation: Unused _timezone parameter in localToUTC() and dayBoundsUTC()
rejectedObservations.reason: The underscore prefix correctly signals intentional non-use. Removing it is a minor cleanup but not worth a separate fix cycle. Workers naturally encountering it may clean it up.

rejectedObservations.observation: No unit tests for getUserTimezone() in web/lib/timezone.ts
rejectedObservations.reason: The function is a simple wrapper that returns Intl.DateTimeFormat().resolvedOptions().timeZone. Testing it requires mocking browser Intl APIs which provides minimal value. Typecheck and build pass coverage is sufficient.
